column1: # Jump Height — 4 MB flash partition map.
# No OTA slots on purpose: v1 flashes over USB (and later the web flasher)
# there's no reason to reserve two app partitions. The space that OTA would
# have taken goes to (a) a bigger app partition
column2: which is what makes room for
and (b) a bigger LittleFS for the moving-time trace + jumps.
